type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Change in calculation procedure - update to equipment specific emission factors

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Change in calculation procedure - update to equipment specific emission factors

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This facility consumed approximately 15% more lease fuel in 2012 when compared to 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The quantity of methanol injected underground with the produced water varies from year to year depending on the amount of methanol in the chemicals added to produced oil and gas.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The amount of tanker traffic was reduced in 2008 due to decreased oil production. This resulted in lower road dust emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The amount of tanker traffic was reduced in 2008 due to decreased oil production. This resulted in lower road dust emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The amount of tanker traffic was reduced in 2008 due to decreased oil production. This resulted in lower road dust emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A current analysis of produced water showed a significant decrease in the concentration of xylenes.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in xylene emissions is a result of updated speciation of storage emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: CO emissions did not exceed the reporting in 2006, but increased flaring has resulted in CO emissions exceeding the threshold in 2007.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A current analysis of produced water showed a significant increase in the concentration of methanol.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM emissions have increased due to the inclusion of road dust emissions and due to increased flaring.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM emissions have increased due to the inclusion of road dust emissions and due to increased flaring.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The large increase in VOC emissions is predominantly a result of casing gas venting not allocated to upstream well sites.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A decrease in the amount of produced water injected has resulted in decreased xylene injection.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A new analysis indicates that there is now no xylene in the produced gas. As a result xylene emissions from the glycol dehydrator are do not contain xylene.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A decrease in the amount of produced water injected has resulted in decreased methanol injection.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Due to increased fuel use methanol emissions from combustion now exceed the minimum reporting amount.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The quantity of waste gas flared increased significantly in 2006.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The quantity of waste gas flared increased significantly in 2006.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: VOC emissions are greater than previous years due to a change in compositional data used to estimate storage and glycol dehydration emissions and to improved methodology for estimating storage losses.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Methanol is part of the produced water injected underground. There was a decrease of about one- third in produced water injected and a corresponding decrease in methanol injected.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Significant reductions in fuel use and road traffic have resulted in lower TPM emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Significant reductions in fuel use and road traffic have resulted in lower PM10 emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Significant reductions in fuel use and road traffic have resulted in lower PM2.5 emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A reduction in the quantity of produced water injected underground has resulted in a decrease in the quantity of xylenes disposed.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A large decrease in the amount of fuel consumed at the site as well as a change in how that fuel is allocated has resulted in a large decrease in xylene emissions from point/stack sources.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The reduction in on-site disposal of methanol is due to a decrease in the quantity of produced water injected underground.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methanol emissions reported in previous years were attributed to exhaust from reciprocating engines. This is no longer a source of reportable methanol emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The analysis of produced water from the Plover Lake Battery was updated in 2004. As a result of this updated analysis, the estimated amount of xylene injected underground with the produced water has dropped.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: A certain amount of material containing NPRI compounds is sent to off-site disposal and recycling facilities, however, the amount varies from year to year depending on activities at the plant.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The analysis of produced water from the Plover Lake Battery was updated in 2004. As a result of this updated analysis, the estimated amount of methanol injected underground with the produced water has increased.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The fuel consumed by the compressor engine at the Plover Lake Battery was considerably smaller in 2003 than in 2002. This has resulted in much lower estimated oxides of nitrogen emissions from the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The fuel consumed by the compressor engine at the Plover Lake Battery was considerably smaller in 2003 than in 2002. This has resulted in lower estimated carbon monoxide emissions from the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The fuel consumed by the compressor engine at the Plover Lake Battery was considerably smaller in 2003 than in 2002. This has resulted in lower estimated methanol emissions from combustion sources the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The average emission factor for PM10 from flaring has been updated. Emissions of this compound have therefore increased.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The average emission factor for PM2.5 from flaring has been updated. Emissions of this compound have therefore increased.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The fuel consumed by the compressor engine at the Plover Lake Battery was considerably smaller in 2003 than in 2002. Furthermore, the average emission factor for VOCs from flaring has been updated. This has resulted in lower estimated VOC emissions from t
